features: HAND WASH: Antibacterial hand wash with aloe vera and natural moisturisers - 2 hour protection cleans, cares and protects hands, leaving them soft and smooth
TWO HOUR PROTECTION: Always practice good hand hygiene with this liquid hand soap, it protects your skin's natural antibacterial defences for to two hours after washing
KILLS 99.9 PERCENTOF BACTERIA: Carex experts have developed this hand wash formula to kill 99.9 percent of bacteria with every wash
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our hand wash is vegan and dermatologically accredited by the skin health alliance
BULK BUY: This pack of 6 x 250 ml bottles of protect original hand wash is a great bulk buy suitable for the whole family - home essentials or business supplies for any kitchen and bathroom
description: Product Description Washing your hands with Carex is one of the easiest ways to help protect yourself and others from illnesses. Our range of antibacterial liquid hand wash is created from a trusted and expertly made formulation which cleans and cares for your skin. This Aloe Vera Antibacterial Hand Wash has added natural moisturisers so you can enjoy soft & smooth hands - gentle skincare. Carex Dermacare hand wash soap formula supports the skin's natural antibacterial defences, it doesn't just clean your hands, but cares and protects them too. Always practice good hand hygiene with this liquid hand soap; it protects your skin's natural antibacterial defences for to 2 hours after washing. Carex experts have developed this hand wash formula to kill 99.9% of bacteria with every wash. Our antibacterial hand wash is vegan & dermatologically accredited by the Skin Health Alliance. This pack of 6 x 250ml bottles of Protect Original Hand Wash is a great bulk buy suitable for the whole family - home essentials. Carex Aloe Vera Hand Wash makes a great self care gift for anyone who cares about their well being. Safety Warning FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY Box Contains 6 x Carex Liquid Soap Aloe 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
